mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, prompting risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and housing starts signals robust economic activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate earnings expectations.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns when both INDPRO and HOUST show positive momentum.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in real sales of new homes above 1.5 million units signals strong consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate revenue outlooks.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns when HOUST exceeds 1500.0.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in inflation expectations, as measured by the CPI, signals accommodative monetary policy, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns despite declining CPIAUCSL trends.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production below 100 signals contractionary supply shocks, prompting negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through reduced corporate output expectations.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns when INDPRO falls below 100.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in both unemployment and payroll employment signal labor market overheating, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through inflationary pressures and central bank policy expectations.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns when both UNRATE and PAYEMS decline.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in real sales of new homes above 1.5 million units signals strong consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate revenue outlooks.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns despite rising HOUST trends.
